examples: 'There's no need to worry,' he said soothingly.
"O, I quite understand," said the Rat soothingly.
"Well then, it isn't, it isn't," replied the Mole soothingly.
In the end a healthy balance sheet and steady profits were what matter, he said soothingly.
Yet if they do not, advises the ministry soothingly, economics tells us that there is no need to worry.
